# Composite Structure Diagram — LangGraph Orchestrator

```mermaid
graph TB
    subgraph ORCH["LangGraph 1.0 Orchestrator (ADR-3)"]
        direction TB
        IN(("in: query + TOC"))
        ROUTER["router : RouterNode<br/>Claude 3 Haiku"]
        COND{"gate : ConfidenceGate<br/>all sections < 0.5?"}
        RET["retrieve : TargetedRetrieveNode"]
        FB["fallback : FallbackRetrieveNode"]
        RERANK["rerank : RerankNode (optional)"]
        GEN["generate : GenerateNode"]
        OUT_R(("out: RouteResponse"))
        OUT_A(("out: SSE answer"))

        IN --> ROUTER
        ROUTER --> COND
        COND -->|"route-only path<br/>(/v1/route terminates)"| OUT_R
        COND -->|"no - scoped"| RET
        COND -->|"yes - fallback"| FB
        RET --> RERANK
        RERANK --> GEN
        FB --> GEN
        GEN --> OUT_A
    end

    PORT_PG["port: sections (Postgres)"]
    PORT_QD["port: chunk vectors (Qdrant)"]
    PORT_LLM["port: Anthropic / OpenAI"]

    ROUTER --- PORT_PG
    ROUTER --- PORT_LLM
    RET --- PORT_QD
    FB --- PORT_QD
    GEN --- PORT_LLM
```

> Internal parts and the route-only termination port reflect HLD §3.2 graph topology exactly; `/v1/route` exits after the confidence gate (HLD §7.2).
